description_long: This sculpture depicts three stylized human figures, with two standing adults holding a smaller child figure between them. The adults are positioned symmetrically, each with one arm supporting the child, who sits with legs dangling. The forms are simplified and abstract, with smooth, rounded heads and minimal facial features. The figures are rendered in a pale, stone-like material and are mounted on a rectangular plinth. The overall composition suggests a sense of unity and support among the figures. The surface appears matte and slightly rough, with subtle variations in color and texture.
description: A pale stone-like sculpture of two adults holding a child between them, rendered in a simplified, abstract style on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the three figures clearly, with the child held between two adults, all facing forward.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the figures and the way the child is supported, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the figures and the arms of the adults supporting the child from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the thickness and profile of the sculpture.
attribute_subject_matter: three human figures, two adults holding a child
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is displayed on a simple plinth, suitable for outdoor urban spaces, plazas, or parks.
